productDisplayName: Q&Q Kids Unisex White Dial Analog Watch
description: Style Note   Check out Q& Q's latest collection of watches for kids. Minimalist styling peppered with innovative design details, we love wearable timepieces by QnQ! Now let your little one flaunt his/her timely bling with panache.   Product Details Case style: Blue plastic rectangular case Dial style: White dial with blue hands Strap style: Blue plastic strap with a tang clasp Features: Branding on the 12 hour mark and a screw to reset time Waterproof to 10 BAR, wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfing Warranty: 1 year Size Case diameter: 17 mm Case thickness: 8 mm
